Monica Fernandez
I'm Monica — a content creator and marketing manager based in Baguio City. With a background in Anthropology and Psychology, I build marketing for local brands, create lifestyle and business content, and speak on personal branding and community-building. My work is rooted in authenticity, purpose, and meaningful connection.
6K+Total Followers
3M+Views Across Platforms
150K+Interactions
180K+Likes

Content Pillars

What I create

🌿

Lifestyle & Daily Life

Behind-the-scenes of life in Baguio — the fog, the coffee, the small beautiful moments.

🤝

Community & Connection

Stories about belonging, showing up for each other, and what it means to build something real.

✨

Faith & Personal Growth

Honest reflections on growth, faith, and becoming — without the performance.

🛍️

Product Reviews & Collabs

Genuine recommendations for brands and products that align with her community's values.

Community

Spaces I've Built

600+ Members · Baguio City

As You Are Baguio

A community that meets people where they are, as they are — creating connection, belonging, and support for both locals and non-locals in the city.

Support Group · Creators

The Creators Table

A space for content creators in Baguio City to share, grow, collaborate, and lift each other up — built on trust, creativity, and genuine community.
